name: vw_active_customers
sql: SELECT c.CustomerID, c.FirstName, c.LastName FROM bronze.CustomerRaw c WHERE c.IsActive = 1

refactor.extracted_sql: SELECT c.CustomerID, c.FirstName, c.LastName FROM bronze.CustomerRaw c WHERE c.IsActive = 1
refactor.refactored_sql: WITH import AS ( SELECT c.CustomerID, c.FirstName, c.LastName, c.IsActive FROM bronze.CustomerRaw c ), logical AS ( SELECT CustomerID, FirstName, LastName FROM import WHERE IsActive = 1 ), final AS ( SELECT CustomerID, FirstName, LastName FROM logical ) SELECT * FROM final

source_tables.summary: Both queries access bronze.CustomerRaw (bronze.customerraw). Source tables match.

output_columns.summary: Both queries return CustomerID, FirstName, LastName in the same order. Output columns match.

joins.summary: No joins in either query. Both are single-table selects from bronze.CustomerRaw.

filters.summary: Both queries apply the same filter: IsActive = 1. Filter logic is preserved.

aggregation_grain.summary: Both queries operate at row level with no aggregation. Grain is identical.
